function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"goal":"Add a /goodbye endpoint to the Flask API that returns a JSON goodbye message and add tests to verify the endpoint behavior.","context":"The project is a Python Flask API (api/app.py). Currently there is a /hello endpoint that returns a greeting message. We need to add a parallel /goodbye endpoint following the same pattern. SOPs require all API endpoints to have tests and return JSON responses.","scope":{"include":["api/app.py"],"create":["api/test_goodbye.py"],"exclude":["node_modules",".git",".semspec"],"do_not_touch":["api/requirements.txt","README.md","ui/app.js","ui/index.html"]}}
